prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic close-up anime portrait of a mysterious young woman, framed tightly on the eyes and upper face with wet, messy black-brown strands falling across her forehead and cheeks. Show exactly 2 large glossy eyes with glowing crimson starburst reflections, long dark lashes, and a melancholic, hypnotic gaze. She wears exactly 1 pair of thin gold-rimmed oval glasses with exactly 2 visible lenses; in the right lens, render a miniature sunset seascape reflection with an orange sun on the horizon, dark distant rock silhouettes, shimmering waves, and exactly 1 small glass bottle containing a tiny paper note floating in the reflected water. Use warm red-orange dusk lighting, sparkling highlights, glass caustics, tiny droplets, jewelry-like gold chain details near the right side, and dramatic high-contrast shadows. Add exactly 1 large opaque muted reddish-brown square censor block centered over the lower middle of the face, covering the nose and mouth area and overlapping both cheeks, while leaving the eyes, hair, glasses, and right-lens reflection visible. Style: highly polished digital anime realism, macro photography composition, intricate hair strands, luminous reflections, romantic dark fantasy mood, 16:9 horizontal canvas, no text, no watermark.
